title: verbena laciniata
intro: Verbena laciniata, also known as the cut-leaved verbena, is a flowering plant species belonging to the verbena family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Verbena laciniata include its ability to relieve anxiety and insomnia, reduce inflammation and pain, and support respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Verbena laciniata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
